'''Slaver Syndicate''' was a member house of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. Their [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] were sometimes turned over to the [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]].

{{Stub}}
